name: quantitative-trading-dashboard
description: Deterministic quantitative trading analysis platform. TradingView is the visualisation layer; all analysis is computed independently.

comments.dependencies: The analysis engine has ZERO runtime dependencies. It is plain ES5-compatible JavaScript loaded via <script> tags, so it runs from file:// or any static host with no build step.
comments.devDependencies: jsdom is required only by tests/phase8-presentation.test.js, which renders the recommendation card in a headless DOM.
comments.serve: tools/serve.js is a minimal static server for local testing. Production uses IIS (see web.config).
